query: SELECT id, contractId, userId, LEFT(summary, 50) as summary_preview FROM analyses WHERE contractId IN (240002, 240003, 240004) ORDER BY createdAt DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2m7Fn1T4rxeAis3.root --database RS3Tk3gBRFpq7dhh58DCcr --execute SELECT id, contractId, userId, LEFT(summary, 50) as summary_preview FROM analyses WHERE contractId IN (240002, 240003, 240004) ORDER BY createdAt DESC;
